description:
This table presents a list of attributes for six polygon features (FID 0-5), likely representing land cover/land use units. Each feature has a `Shape *` type of "Polygon" and a `DU ID` of "DU008B". The table includes hierarchical `MAES` (Mapping and Assessment of Ecosystems and their Services) classification codes across four levels (`MAES 1` to `MAES 4`). Specific land cover information is provided in the `TCD` (Tree Cover Density) and `UA` (Urban Atlas) columns. The `AREA_HA` column indicates the area of each polygon in hectares, and `NODATA` is consistently 0. The `COMMENT` column is empty.

For example, FID 2 has `MAES 1` code 3, `MAES 2` code 33, `MAES 3` code 333, `MAES 4` code 3331, and a `TCD` value indicating "TCD - 50 - 80%", covering an area of 0.195907 hectares. FIDs 4 and 5 both have `MAES 1` code 1, `MAES 2` code 11, `MAES 3` code 111, `MAES 4` code 1111, and are associated with "UA 2006", covering 5.444732 hectares and 3.983764 hectares, respectively. The largest feature is FID 3, with an `AREA_HA` of 61.452646, sharing the same MAES codes (2, 21, 211, 2111) as FID 0.

| FID | Shape * | ID | DU ID | MAES 1 | MAES 2 | MAES 3 | MAES 4 | TCD | UA | AREA_HA | NODATA | COMMENT |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 0 | Polygon | 1 | DU008B | 2 | 21 | 211 | 2111 | | | 14.411262 | 0 | |
| 1 | Polygon | 2 | DU008B | 3 | 34 | 341 | 3412 | | | 0.419493 | 0 | |
| 2 | Polygon | 3 | DU008B | 3 | 33 | 333 | 3331 | TCD - 50 - 80% | | 0.195907 | 0 | |
| 3 | Polygon | 4 | DU008B | 2 | 21 | 211 | 2111 | | | 61.452646 | 0 | |
| 4 | Polygon | 5 | DU008B | 1 | 11 | 111 | 1111 | | UA 2006 | 5.444732 | 0 | |
| 5 | Polygon | 6 | DU008B | 1 | 11 | 111 | 1111 | | UA 2006 | 3.983764 | 0 | |

This table provides detailed attribute information for individual geographic features, including their classification according to the MAES framework, specific land cover types like Tree Cover Density (TCD) and Urban Atlas (UA), and their computed area in hectares.
